input: Research leads for our AI infrastructure product. ICP: Series B+ SaaS companies with 50-500 employees in North America, currently using AWS or GCP, with a VP of Engineering or CTO as decision maker. Find top 10 leads and draft outreach for the top 3.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Parses ICP into structured criteria (company size, funding stage, geography, tech stack, decision-maker titles)
Phase 2a: Runs Apollo prospect search for matching companies and contacts
Phase 2b: In parallel, runs Common Room account research (if available) or web-based company research
Phase 3: Merges results, scores each lead on 5 dimensions (ICP fit, recency, seniority, engagement, data completeness)
Phase 4: Generates personalized outreach drafts for top 3 leads with signal-anchored hooks
Phase 5: Saves leads-ranked.md, outreach-drafts.md, manifest.json to outputs/lead-research-agent/{date}/
success_criteria: 10 leads ranked with composite scores; top 3 have email + LinkedIn outreach drafts; no fabricated signals; manifest.json complete

description: Korean ICP description with Korean output
input: 리드 리서치 해줘. ICP: 한국 핀테크 스타트업, 시리즈 A 이상, 직원 20-100명, CTO 또는 기술이사가 의사결정자. 상위 5개 리드 찾아줘.
expected_behavior: Adjusts search to Korean market (KOSPI/KOSDAQ companies, Korean LinkedIn)
Generates Korean report with bilingual outreach drafts
success_criteria: 5 leads found and scored; output in Korean; ICP criteria correctly parsed from Korean input

description: Deep research on a specific target company rather than ICP search
input: Research Databricks as a potential customer. Find the right decision makers for our GPU orchestration platform and draft a personalized outreach email.
expected_behavior: Runs deep company research via kwp-sales-account-research
Identifies relevant decision-makers (VP Eng, Head of Infra, etc.)
Generates highly personalized outreach anchored to company-specific signals (recent funding, tech blog posts, job postings)
success_criteria: Company profile generated; 3+ decision-makers identified; outreach draft references real company signals

description: Sales call preparation should route to kwp-sales-call-prep
input: I have a call with the CTO of Stripe tomorrow. Help me prepare talking points and research their infrastructure needs.
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for call preparation
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to kwp-sales-call-prep

description: Competitive intelligence should route to kwp-sales-competitive-intelligence
input: Research our competitors in the GPU orchestration space and build a battlecard comparing our features
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for competitive analysis
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to kwp-sales-competitive-intelligence
